title: Jamaican Beef Stew
description: A rich and flavorful Jamaican-inspired stew made with tender beef and a variety of spices. Perfect for a cozy dinner or romantic evening.
instructions: Season the beef with salt, pepper, and jerk seasoning.
Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown the beef in batches, about 5 minutes per batch.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the browned beef, stew tomatoes, and enough water to cover the beef. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
